vulnerabilities.evidence:
Something’s wrong here…

Unknown auth client '`onmouseover=alert(1) `'

Back to homepage
vulnerabilities.remediation: 1. HTML-encode all user-supplied data before rendering in HTML. 2. Implement a strict Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header. 3. Use framework-level auto-escaping (Django, Jinja2, etc.). 4. Validate and whitelist all user input server-side. 5. Set HttpOnly and Secure flags on session cookies.
